releaseNotes: v0.38.2 — Scanning fix + interactive reconciliation. The manual edit pop-up no longer appears on a 2D scan that already has everything: it was firing in the split second while the drug name and dose were being looked up, so it now appears only when the name, dose, or expiration is genuinely missing. New — Resolve discrepancies interactively: after importing a Liberty Stock report, the Reports screen offers 'Resolve discrepancies (interactive)', which steps you through only the mismatched NDCs so you can correct each count or acknowledge it with a required note, then export or print a clean resolved report for your records. Daily Intake and Activity now show clearer, friendlier empty states. The auto-updater rolls 0.38.1 -> 0.38.2 on next launch; your data is unchanged. 806 tests passing; three-reviewer pre-release audit, all findings fixed (including a Windows print-path safeguard).
